name: CCELL - Silo Battery
summary: The CCELL Silo is a compact and potent battery built specifically for vape cartridges.
description: The CCELL Silo is a compact and potent battery built specifically for vape cartridges. Its simple, inhale-activated feature allows for easy portability, while the magnetic connection maintains a secure and stable attachment to the cartridge. Compatible with most 510 concentrate cartridges This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
